_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Ability to evaluate, analyze, and synthesize large quantities of data (which may be fragmented and contradictory) into high quality, fused targeting/intelligence products.
reference_document_element_description: Ability to evaluate and adopt new technologies, frameworks, and tools for data and AI work, assessing maturity, community support, integration requirements, and organizational fit before recommending adoption.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI TF domain. TF-A-003 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-A-001 (TF, cosine: 0.566), DQ-S-006 (DQ, cosine: 0.540).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.3/10 (raw 0.534). Shared vocabulary: [ability, data, evaluate]. DCWF-only terms [analyze, contradictory, fragmented, fused, high, intelligence] vs WIDAI-only terms [adopt, adoption, ai, assessing, community, fit] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.863 (P=0.863, R=0.864). Balanced P/R — the 22-word DCWF element and 27-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Ability to evaluate, analyze, and synthesize large quantities of data (which may" and "Ability to evaluate and adopt new technologies, frameworks, and tools for data a" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.581 ≈ STS 0.534 (gap 0.046). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [ability, data, evaluate] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 12.2%. Shared tokens: [ability, data, evaluate]. DCWF-only: [analyze, contradictory, fragmented, fused, high, intelligence]. WIDAI-only: [adopt, adoption, ai, assessing, community, fit].

signals.detail: STS 0.534 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.
